summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Digital Twin Agent installer hardening fixes. All static code changes verified, HTTP no-cache headers working correctly, MSI contains hardened code, and all runtime scenarios (missing seed, import error, valid enrollment) return correct exit codes. Backend auth/enrollment flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Static: /app/agent/digital_twin_agent/__main__.py wraps module-level imports in try/except with _TOPLEVEL_IMPORT_ERROR (6 occurrences found)
Static: main() checks _TOPLEVEL_IMPORT_ERROR at startup and returns exit code 5 with full traceback
Static: if __name__ == '__main__': block wraps main() in try/except BaseException returning 5
Static: main() dispatch wrapped in try/except BaseException returning 5 for bootstrap command
Static: /app/backend/app/routers/installer.py defines _no_cache_headers() helper function
Static: _no_cache_headers applied to /api/installer/DigitalTwinAgentSetup.exe
Static: _no_cache_headers applied to /api/installer/DigitalTwinAgentSetup.msi
Static: _no_cache_headers applied to /api/installer/release.zip
HTTP: GET /api/installer/DigitalTwinAgentSetup.exe returns cache-control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0
HTTP: GET /api/installer/DigitalTwinAgentSetup.exe returns pragma: no-cache
HTTP: GET /api/installer/DigitalTwinAgentSetup.exe returns expires: 0
HTTP: GET /api/installer/DigitalTwinAgentSetup.exe returns non-empty etag
HTTP: GET /api/installer/DigitalTwinAgentSetup.msi returns all no-cache headers
HTTP: GET /api/installer/release.zip returns all no-cache headers
Artifact: DigitalTwinAgentSetup.exe has correct magic bytes (MZ)
Artifact: DigitalTwinAgentSetup.msi has correct magic bytes (D0CF11E0A1B11AE1)
Artifact: release.zip has correct magic bytes (PK\x03\x04)
Artifact: MSI contains hardened __main__.py with 6 occurrences of '_TOPLEVEL_IMPORT_ERROR' (>= 5 required)
Runtime: python3 -m digital_twin_agent bootstrap with missing seed returns exit code 4 (not 1)
Runtime: Simulated cryptography import failure returns exit code 5 with traceback containing 'cryptography' (not 1)
Runtime: python3 -m digital_twin_agent bootstrap with valid enrollment code returns exit code 0
Runtime: Bootstrap with valid code creates config.json and redacts enrollment_token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin@digitaltwin.com returns access_token
Backend: POST /api/enrollment/codes creates valid enrollment code
Backend: POST /api/enrollment/enroll with valid code returns device credentials
